stemHtml: What is included in the Basic Empty Mass?

options.a: Unusable fuel and other unusable fluids; lubricating oil in engine and auxiliary units; fire extinguishers; pyrotechnics; emergency oxygen equipment; supplementary electronic equipment.
options.b: Usable fuel and other fluids; lubricating oil in engine and auxiliary units; fire extinguishers; pyrotechnics; emergency oxygen equipment; supplementary electronic equipment.
options.c: Usable fuel and other fluids; lubricating oil in engine and auxiliary units; fire extinguishers; pyrotechnics; passenger supplementary oxygen; basic electronic equipment.
options.d: Unusable fuel and other unusable fluids; lubricating oil in engine and auxiliary units; fire extinguishers; pyrotechnics; passenger supplementary oxygen; basic electronic equipment.
